The service from all the staff at the gas station was very friendly. They need to invest more in services for members.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Vivo en Villa Mercedes y nunca recibí tan mala atención como el día de hoy. Los playeros con actitudes desubicadas y mala atención. Espero próximamente tengan más cuidado en la selección del personal.

(Translated by Google)
I live in Villa Mercedes and I've never received such poor service as today. The beach attendants have a disorganized attitude and poor service. I hope they'll be more careful in their staff selection soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIejVMQXh3RRAB
